name: Crispy Tilapia Sticks Recipe
brief_description: Crispy tilapia fillets seasoned with garlic and onion powder, dredged in Panko breadcrumbs, and deep-fried until golden brown. Perfect as a main course or appetizer.

instructions.text: Combine the salt, garlic powder, onion powder, and ground black pepper in a bowl mix well.
Rub the mixture all over the sliced tilapia fillets.
Meanwhile, pour the oil in a deep cooking pot. Turn on the heat and start to heat-up the oil.

Dip the tilapia fillet in the bowl with beaten egg then dredge the tilapia in Panko breadcrumbs. Make sure that the tilapia is well coated. To save more breadcrumbs and for better coating, you can place the breadcrumbs in a container with cover. Simply put 2 to 3 pieces of tilapia fillet in the container with breadcrumbs, cover it, and then shake the container back and forth. You will see that the tilapia will be coated properly.
Put the breaded tilapia into the hot oil and start to deep fry the fish until the color turns golden brown. Use medium heat for this step.
Remove the deep fried crispy tilapia sticks from the cooking pot and place in a plate lined with paper towel. This will absorb the excess oil.
Transfer the crispy tilapia sticks in a serving plate and serve with a bowl of fresh ranch dressing. You can also serve this with tartar sauce.

ingredients.name: tilapia fillet
ingredients.preparation: thick, sliced lengthwise into 3 to 4 pieces

recipe_notes: Ensure oil is hot enough (350°F/175°C) before frying to prevent soggy coating.
Do not overcrowd the pot when frying.
For extra flavor, add paprika or cayenne to the breadcrumb mixture.
storage_notes: Store leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.
Reheat in oven or air fryer to maintain crispiness.
